## Verses (5)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Those whose hope is in the Lord are like the mountain of Zion, which may not be moved, but keeps its place for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | As the mountains are round about Jerusalem, so the Lord is round about his people, from this time and for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | For the rod of sinners will not be resting on the heritage of the upright; so that the upright may not put out their hands to evil. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Do good, O Lord, to those who are good, and to those who are upright in heart. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | But as for such as are turned out of the straight way, the Lord will take them away with the workers of evil. Let peace be on Israel. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
